name: Frog story
short_description: The story of a frog trapped in an eternal maze, help a frog with knowledge of karate to go through this maze and get free
detailed_description:
The Beinbee frog always lived in its swamp and did not interfere with anyone, until it was whirled into a whirlpool and found itself in a closed labyrinth. Help the frog to get out through the almost impassable areas to the frog Beinbee
- light music;
-good graphics;
-simple management;
- interesting gameplay;
about_the_game:
The Beinbee frog always lived in its swamp and did not interfere with anyone, until it was whirled into a whirlpool and found itself in a closed labyrinth. Help the frog to get out through the almost impassable areas to the frog Beinbee

-simple management;
- interesting gameplay;
